intro_title: Have a question? We'd love to hear from you.
intro_description: Our team is available to answer all your questions about FiNext. Write to us and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
form_description: Fill out the form and we'll get in touch with you within 24 hours.
send_error: We could not send your message. Please try again in a few minutes.
reason1_description: We solve any technical issue you have with the platform
reason2_description: Information about plans, pricing, and premium features
reason3_description: Your ideas help us improve FiNext every day
finext_team_desc: This project is currently under active development. We truly appreciate all kinds of feedback, suggestions, and bug reports to help us improve the experience and continue building better features for everyone. Thank you for being part of the journey.
